title: Network Engineer
description:
Roles and Responsibilities

  • Design, deploy, and maintain enterprise network infrastructure including LAN, WAN, WLAN, and VPN solutions.
  • Rack and stack network and IT equipment in data centers or client premises.
  • Configure and troubleshoot network devices such as switches, routers, wireless controllers, and firewalls.
  • Install, configure, and support network operating systems and related hardware/software (e.g., Cisco IOS, FortiOS, Aruba, etc.).
  • Conduct routine network maintenance and implement upgrades/patches as needed.
  • Work closely with project teams to ensure successful network implementation and integration.
  • Document network configurations, diagrams, and processes.
  • Perform maintenance activities after office hours or during weekends when required.
  • Assist in overall IT infrastructure initiatives and cross-functional technical projects as assigned.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • 3 to 10 years of hands-on experience in enterprise network implementation, administration, and support.
  • Strong technical knowledge in configuring and managing Cisco, Fortinet, or equivalent networking platforms.
  • Familiarity with network protocols and services (e.g., TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLAN, STP, DHCP, DNS).
  • Experience with network monitoring and management tools (e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, Wireshark).
  • Understanding of network security best practices and firewall policy configuration.
  • Industry certifications such as CCNA, CCNP, or equivalent are highly desirable.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.
  • Excellent teamwork, communication, and interpersonal skills.

postedCompany.description:
Aggasys Solutions is a Singapore incorporated organisation established in January 2006. We provide various IT professional services including but not limited to:

1. IT Infrastructure Consulting and Solutioning

2. Infrastructure and System Design

3. Enterprise Application solutions

4. Enterprise Storage solutions

5. Systems implementation and integration

6. Maintenance services with prompt engineer response

Aggasys Solutions is also a reseller of various IT products. Our partners include Dell, Symantec, Microsoft, Vmware, Exagrid, etc.

Our engineers are equipped with professional certificates. This assures our clients that we provide only professionally certified engineers onsite to manage their IT assets.

We were awarded ISO 9001 certified for sales and service delivery of IT solutions. This is to ensure total quality management for our customers' satisfaction.
postedCompany.name: AGGASYS SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
